name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no pressure at all, we know life gets busy. We just wanted you to know the door's still open here at Bright Smile Dental, and if it ever feels like the right time to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's 20% off to make it easier:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days — just use it when you book your next visit.

If something about your last experience didn't feel right, we'd genuinely love to know. Hit reply — a real person on our team reads every message, and we're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads-up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days if you'd like to come back in. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
